calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2008 Continued To Dec-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Joel D. Bierer, Esq. appeared with petitioner David Reel, who was present as guardian ad litem for the minor Sydney Reel, who was also present at today's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Total Settlement - $31,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $7,608.06.
Medical Expenses -$567.73.
Costs - $6,778.48.

A net balance of $16,045.73 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 145 West Portal Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94127. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
